transcript.clean_text: welcome back to gcn and eurosport for highlights of the 15th stage of the giroud italia a day that would see eight border crossings between italy and slovenia over 147 kilometers starting in grado the rides would head towards a circuit mid-race and on that they would tackle three ascent of a short but steep fourth category climb at gornier cerevo after that it was an undulating final 17 kilometers to the finish line in goritsa which is just inside the italian border attacks came immediately after the flag dropped but soon after that the race was neutralized that after a particularly large and nasty crash jos van emden of jumbo visma and natmel baharni of cofadis were forced to withdraw with the injuries that they sustained whilst borah hansger lost their man who was sat sixth on gc emmanuel buchmann with so many riders needing medical attention from the various doctors on the giro the organisers took the decision to halt the race in case of further crashes after about half an hour though racing resumed and again the attacks came immediately a strong group of 15 forcing themselves off the front balcomoloma in it yet again as well as half the remaining quebec asos riders giacomo nizora did not start this morning but campeonatz valshait and viznovsky had their sights set on a third stage win for the team and it was the belgian who launched the first attack from the break taking oscar izubik of alps in fenix and alba torres of mobistar with him the slovenian fans were out in force despite the heavens opening watching on as campernaut's pace saw torres distance over the top of the final climb behind them herman's cataldo and nicus aren't trying to chase them down the run in towards the finish though was fascinating kampernatz and rizabik trading blows constantly and attacking each other in an attempt to go solo they couldn't afford to muck about though mollimer keen to chase him down and finally take his giro stage win with just over one kilometer to go the front two were back together and it would end up coming down to a sprint between them rizabek decided to go first and he went very early with 150 meters still to go though victor kampernitz was on to his wheel and soon after that he would manage to come around it it would be a third stage win in just five days for the quebec squad and a first ever grand tour stage win for victor kampernitz third on the day would go to nikki's aunt at team dsm who led in the chasing group of five just a few seconds further back a more popular winner you would be hard pushed to find though he's been fighting for this moment for years and finally today victor camponette's dream came true and team quebec asos must be on cloud nine the other riders in the five-man chasing group were consonny herman's cataldo and molomar torres finished up in eighth malana and valshard rounding out the top ten puccio and ghana who'd ridden on the front of the peloton for most of the day led the bunch across the line with the gc riders all safely encompassed within it and so there was no change in the top five on the general classification but with bookman out of the race everybody that was behind him has moved up one position tomorrow it's the queen stage and it's a monster a 212 kilometer marathon with five and a half thousand meters of climbing and they'll be climbing almost from the start the first category lacrosse will provide the climbers with an opportunity to make the early move after that comes the descent and it's a long gradual rise to the foot of the passover daya then straight onto the chima copy the highest point of this year's race the paso por deux 2 239 metres above sea level the hardest climb comes near the end though it's the passo jiao 10 k's long at 9.3 percent average after which it's a fast but technical run into the finish line in cortina dampezo and if the forecast is correct that will make it even harder rain sleet snow and even high winds are predicted you do not want to miss it and you can watch every single kilometer on gcn plus from 9 30 bst territory restrictions apply see you tomorrow
